title: history arc 04 git integration
summary: The development thread for history arc 04 focused on integrating Git capabilities across five axes, with a primary goal of enhancing the system's ability to track changes. Key decisions included introducing a 1Hz diff-aware poll for git status, addressing a bug related to stale markers, and implementing a FSEvents backstop. The outcome was the addition of git-aware features without supersedes, improving the system's responsiveness and accuracy in tracking changes.
